creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Älven from comment #17)

Is the build tree you use for the Poudriere builds up to date?  Try rebasing it on top of the current main tree.

Yes, the default CPE_VENDOR seems to be wrong for this port, so an explicit assignment is needed.

Feel free to disregard upstreams port makefile if any; it can serve as an inspiration, but needs not be followed.
